extraction.one_line_summary: MALECZEUK won stage 3 sprint at Tour of Hainan/Qinghai Lake (commentary conflates multiple Asian races), defeating MARINI and PASQUALON in flat finale.
extraction.winner: Cannot determine - MALECZEUK not in roster
tactical_patterns: Breakaway groups with 5+ riders from different teams forced peloton to chase hard despite short Asian stage profiles.
Sprint teams allowed early breaks to gain 4+ minutes before organizing chase inside final 10km on flat Asian stages.
Bonus seconds at intermediate sprints became tactical priority for prologue specialists seeking GC gains on short stage races.

rider_signals.MARINI Nicolas: positive: won opening road stage then consistently placed top-6 in sprints while under contract pressure, showing consistency under stress
rider_signals.PASQUALON Andrea: neutral: podiumed stage 3 but unable to challenge for win despite team support from Japanese domestique
